title: Show mirrored Columns on Kanban Cards
excerpt:
I am super happy about the new flexible Kanban cards! 
However I am using a Kanban with a client to quickly view statuses and necessary information via mirrored information that are relevant to the client. Leaving all ir…

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am super happy about the new flexible Kanban cards!
However I am using a Kanban with a client to quickly view statuses and necessary information via mirrored information that are relevant to the client. Leaving all irrelevant information on our team board.

The title already says everything. It would be great to include the mirrored columns in the selection to display on the cards.
Thus far we have to use extra columns in the client board which have to be manually matched to the hidden mirrored columns.

Hope I did not confuse.
Best regards!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
I am happy to share that this feature has been released. If you have any questions about it, feel free to open a new product discussion topic!

Thank you for submitting your feedback. It is important to us!

posts.author: bsgilli (Beth G)
posts.cookedHtml: And now the feature is gone again this week with the release of a new Kanban card/customization UI. I do hope that mirrored columns on Kanban cards will be coming back…

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems like SOME mirrored columns work in kanban view - some don’t. I’m using the Basic CRM template and a Contacts mirrored column works from another board but other columns mirrored from came other board do not appear as options to customize the kanban card view.

posts.author: anca.racu (Anca Racu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
You can use Unlimited Mirror Column App, and create normal columns instead of mirror columns.

monday.com

monday.com: Apps Marketplace

monday.com apps marketplace, Expand the capabilities of your Work OS with monday apps

Best,

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: If I had a dollar for every time someone recommends a subscription for an external app that solves problems that should be fixed natively, I could actually afford all these apps …

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: I am not seeing that mirrored columns are available in Kanban cards. Is this something that has to be ‘turned on’ at an admin level or something?

posts.author: xmasterg (TZ)
posts.cookedHtml: NOPE, this is not solved and cant make freakin kanban from mirrored status column! this is truly insane. Monday has made simple things soooooooo haard.

posts.author: ashwin.madival (Ashwin M)
posts.cookedHtml: ITs extremely tedious to update multiple tasks in a group if the for a dummy status column because this feature is not available

posts.author: cabanasr (Ruben Cabanas)
posts.cookedHtml: Any workaround from anyone? any automation that can help?..our IT team do not approve the use of external apps (with little exceptions)

posts.author: arf (Alex R-F)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need this feature back, please! It seems we lost it with the new kanban UI.

Especially with the rollout of Monday Workflows—allowing users to build more complex systems of integrated boards—users REALLY need to be able to see mirror columns on kanban cards.
